translations.### Plane.so 免費開源且支援 Self-Hosted 的類 Asan: ### Plane.so Free, Open-Source, and Self-Hosted Alternative to Asana/Jira Project Management Tool
translations.#### Issue 評論，輸入中文時選完字就直接送出問題\n\n: #### Issue Comments: Problem with Immediate Submission After Selecting Chinese Characters
translations.**Plane Product Roadmap 可參考 [官網資訊](https: **Plane Product Roadmap can be found at [official website](https://sites.plane.so/plane/459cfcdf-dc9c-49a6-9d4b-a89f91440189/?board=kanban){:target="_blank"}:**
translations.**Project 右上角「…」可進行：**\n\n: **The "…" at the top right of the project allows you to:**
translations.**創建完成後可在 Workspace 下拉選單上切換不同 Workspace，: **After creation, you can switch between different Workspaces using the Workspace dropdown menu, and also access Workspace Settings from there:**
translations.**如果沒有 Asana 或類似的專案管理工具：**\n\n: **If you don't have Asana or similar project management tools:**
translations.**如過一個 Issue 一直在 In-Progress & Cycle 中切換: **If an Issue keeps switching between In-Progress and Cycle (not completed in one Cycle), consider breaking the Issue into smaller parts for easier project management**
translations.**每週一 Sprint Planning Meeting：從 Backlog: **Weekly Sprint Planning Meeting: Select Issues from the Backlog and ongoing Issues (To Do or In Progress), set Priority/Estimate, plan the current Sprint, and add them to the Cycle**
translations.**每週五 Sprint Review Meeting：單純 Review 本週: **Weekly Friday Sprint Review Meeting: Simply review this week's Issues (not planning for next week), quickly go over completed Issues, and ensure Estimates are filled in for future statistics.**
translations.**比較重要的設定是 Members，我們需要邀請團隊成員加入 Workspac: **A key setting is Members, where we need to invite team members to join the Workspace:**
translations.**目前僅能透過 Email 通知：**\n\n: **Currently, notifications are only available via Email:**
translations.**目前官方不提供從 Cloud 匯出，匯入到 Self-Hosted，只能自己: **Currently, the official version does not support exporting from Cloud to Self-Hosted. You can only achieve this by connecting through the API yourself. Therefore, if you are considering using Self-Hosted locally, it is recommended to treat the Cloud version as a trial only.**
translations.**請注意：** ⚠️ **開源 不等於 免費** ⚠️ **，** 如同 Gi: **Note:** ⚠️ **Open source does not mean free** ⚠️. Like Github and Gitlab, there are many project management tools similar to Github, such as Asana, Jira, and Clickup. However, there is no open-source product as good as Gitlab yet. Plane's goal is to become the Gitlab of project management tools.
translations.**開發中專案難免有 Bug、體驗問題，請大家多給 Plane.so 團隊一點耐: **In a project under development, bugs and experience issues are inevitable. Please be patient with the Plane.so team; if you encounter any problems, feel free to report them below:**
translations.**順便推薦一下這個網站，收錄很多可以支援 Self-Hosted 的服務：**: **By the way, I recommend this website, which lists many services that support Self-Hosted:**
translations.**點擊「Create Issue」開始建立 Issue：**\n\n: **Click "Create Issue" to start creating an Issue:**
translations.- **Sprint Cycle: One Week**\n\n- Backlo:
- **Sprint Cycle: One Week**

- Backlog: Create an Issue for any task or idea, set State = Backlog, **fill in Estimate and Priority**

- **Weekly Sprint Planning Meeting: Select Issues from the Backlog and ongoing Issues (To Do or In Progress), set Priority/Estimate, plan the current Sprint, and add them to the Cycle**

- If there is an urgent Issue added during the Sprint, it should be directly created in the current week's Cycle.

- Daily Stand-up: Spend 15 minutes every morning quickly sharing the status of each Issue

- Change issue status to ToDo/In Progress when preparing to start or starting execution

- Change the Issue status to Done when completed, or add a Review State.

- **Weekly Friday Sprint Review Meeting: Simply review this week's Issues (not planning for next week), quickly go over completed Issues, and ensure Estimates are filled in for future statistics.**

- Try to ensure all Issues in the Cycle are completed by Friday each week. **Unfinished Issues should be added to the next week's Cycle or moved to Pending/Cancel**.

- Continuously iterate the above process to manage all Issues and Projects
translations.- Add to favorites, Pin to Favorites (ab:
- Add to favorites, Pin to Favorites (above Your Projects)

- Publish generates a public external link, similar to the official [Roadmap Project](https://sites.plane.so/plane/459cfcdf-dc9c-49a6-9d4b-a89f91440189/?board=kanban){:target="_blank"}

- Draft Issues View saved draft issues

- Archives View archived Issues
translations.- After entering, you can create a Proje:
- After entering, you can create a Project from the Projects section on the left.

- Unlike Asana, an Issue in Plane can only be added to one Project.

- The display mode can be switched in the top right corner.

- By default, all Sub-Issues are expanded. If it feels cluttered, go to Display -> uncheck Show sub-Issues.
translations.- After pasting the code, click \"Save\": - After pasting the code, click "Save" to save.
translations.- Can be saved as draft Issues\n\n- Supp:
- Can be saved as draft Issues

- Supports text styling and Code Block

- Supports Markdown

- Supports text wrapping around images, allows direct drag-and-drop image upload

- Supports multiple Assignees (more convenient than Asana, which only allows one Assignee per Task)

- Choose Priority. Different priorities have different highlight styles (currently, Priority customization is not available).
translations.- Click to view Cycle details. At the to:
- Click to view Cycle details. At the top, you can use different display modes and filters to view Issues.

- On the right side, there are burn-down charts and execution status.

- Issues can be viewed by Assignees, Labels, and States
translations.- Click to view Module details. You can:
- Click to view Module details. You can use different display modes and filters above to view Issues.

- On the right side, there are burn-down charts and execution status.

- Issues can be viewed by Assignees, Labels, and States.

- You can add Links to Modules.
translations.- Cycles: Similar to Sprints, a cycle is: - Cycles: Similar to Sprints, a cycle is a time iteration or version. Each Issue can only belong to one Cycle.
translations.- Drive: Similar to Google Drive team fi: - Drive: Similar to Google Drive team file features.
translations.- Each team has its own Workspace\n\n- E:
- Each team has its own Workspace

- Each team will have a main product Project.

- Projects: Other projects can be created, such as marketing campaigns, customer support projects, or projects for external collaboration, separate from the main product development project.

- Modules: Create Function Modules (Design, Frontend, Backend, App) to help Team Leads track progress and set OKRs or project goals as Modules (Increase Conversion Rate, OKR-1 Increase GMV…)

- Cycle: Create a Cycle based on the Sprint cycle. For example, if there is one Sprint per week, you can create `W12` or use the Monday date like `2024–05–27`.

- Since automatic Cycle creation is not available, you need to create future Cycles monthly or weekly in advance.

- Create an Issue for Every Task

- If possible, add Start Date & Due Date, Modules, and Priority to the Issue.

- **If an Issue keeps switching between In-Progress and Cycle (not completed in one Cycle), consider breaking the Issue into smaller parts for easier project management**
translations.- For everything, we need direct communi:
- For everything, we need direct communication with the other team. Direct communication is most effective for P0 issues, but in daily work, 90% of the time the issues are not P0. Direct person-to-person communication for all matters, big or small, is very inefficient and can [interrupt the other person's workflow](../11f6c8568154/).

- Task execution lacks transparency, and only the parties involved know the progress. For tasks involving multiple people, progress can only be confirmed through repeated communication. Additionally, supervisors find it difficult to grasp everyone's tasks for proper scheduling.

- Task scheduling: In daily work, we receive many tasks with varying priorities and directions. Having a tool helps collect and categorize similar issues, so they can be addressed together later. It also makes it easier to identify important tasks in daily planning.

- Task handover is facilitated by tools that record task details and execution status. When assistance from others is needed, the task can be quickly taken over based on the content in the Task.
translations.- From the avatar -> Settings -> Prefere: - From the avatar -> Settings -> Preferences -> Theme, you can select the Plane theme
translations.- General Workspace Avatar, Name, URL\n\:
- General Workspace Avatar, Name, URL

- Billing and plans Payment Information and Upgrade Options

- Integrations Third-party integrations, currently the free version only offers Github and Slack integrations

- Imports feature currently only supports Jira and Github Project imports

- Exports feature currently supports only csv, excel, and json formats.

- Webhooks API tokens, self-integrate with API
translations.- General: General Project Settings\n\n-:
- General: General Project Settings

- Members: Project members, project permissions

- States: Project Issue statuses (will be introduced later)

- Labels: Project Labels Management

- Features: Allows control over which features to enable (Inbox is disabled by default)

- Estimates: Project time estimation field settings (to be introduced later)

- Integrations: Third-Party Integrations (Workspace must be enabled first)

- Automations: The free version currently only supports automatically archiving Closed Issues after X time and automatically closing incomplete Issues after X time.
translations.- Go to Avatar -> Settings -> Preference: - Go to Avatar -> Settings -> Preferences -> Email to enable Email notifications
translations.- Guest/Viewer currently have no major f:
- Guest/Viewer currently have no major functional differences; they can only view Issues, Comments, and Emojis. External users outside the organization’s email domain are classified as Guests, while those within the same organization are Viewers.

- Members can operate all functions.

- Admins can access Settings.
translations.- Home shows all Projects and member sta:
- Home shows all Projects and member status in the entire Workspace

- Analytics for All Members, Issues Analysis

- Projects All Projects

- All Issues Issues from all Projects

- Active Cycles All Projects Current Cycle Status

- Notifications Issues Notifications
translations.- Inbox: Issue Proposed process allows c: - Inbox: The Issue Proposed process allows creating proposal Issues. Only approved proposals will become actual Issues in the project; rejected ones are discarded.
translations.- Introduction to Plane.so\n\n- Plane.so:
- Introduction to Plane.so

- Plane.so User Guide

- Plane.so x Scrum Workflow Example

- Appendix
translations.- Issues: Same as Asana Tasks, all work: - Issues: Similar to Asana Tasks, all work is created as Issues to be scheduled or kept as records.
translations.- Layouts & Views: You can view Issues u: - Layouts & Views: You can view Issues using Gantt charts, calendars, boards, lists, and Sheet modes. You can also save filter criteria and display settings as Views for quick access.
translations.- Modules can be used as project collect:
- Modules can be used as project collections, OKR goals, or functional categories (Design, FE, BE, App, etc.).

- Project Lead & Members can be set

- Project progress and Issue States differ, with additional statuses: Planned and Paused

- Date range can be set
translations.- Modules: Project, module, and categori: - Modules: Project, module, and categorization features. Each issue can be assigned to multiple modules.
translations.- Pages offers a WYSIWYG document editor:
- Pages offers a WYSIWYG document editor, making it easy to write documents and insert images.

- Currently, directory and category features are not supported, which can cause confusion when there are many documents.

- Document Permissions: Public - visible to all Project members; Private - visible only to yourself.
translations.- Pages: A simple document feature to re: - Pages: A simple document feature to record work and product-related notes.
translations.- Pressing Enter to select a word no lon: - Pressing Enter to select a word no longer submits automatically. Use Space + Shift + Enter to insert a line break, and manually click Comment to submit the comment.
translations.- Project Name, Description, Cover Image:
- Project Name, Description, Cover Image, Prefix (Issue Alias e.g. `APP-1`)

- Project Permissions: Public - All members who join the Workspace can view and join; Private - Only invited members can join

- Lead: Main person in charge of the project
translations.- Select Issue State. States can be adju: - Select Issue State. States can be adjusted or added in Settings:
translations.- Select Modules to add multiple modules:
- Select Modules to add multiple modules, for example: `Login Optimization`, `App`, etc. (Settings will be introduced later)

- Select a Cycle to choose which Sprint to work on; only one can be selected, for example: `W22`, `S22`, `2024–05` … (settings will be introduced later)

- Custom Issue Properties are not supported yet

- Select Add parent to add this Issue as a Sub-Issue under the Parent Issue.

- Selecting Labels (a.k.a Tag feature)

- Select Start Date, Due Date… (Currently does not support exact time or Repeated Issue)

- Select Estimate (a.k.a Scrum story point or estimated resources). Estimates can be adjusted or added in Settings; however, currently only one Estimate field can be enabled, and the Estimate Value can only have 6 options. (The official roadmap states this feature will be improved in 2024 Q2)
translations.- Subscribed Issues will notify you of s:
- Subscribed Issues will notify you of status changes, content updates, and new comments.

- By default, Issues that you create, are assigned to, or lead in a project will be subscribed.

- Currently no Slack or third-party notifications
translations.- The development version is updated rou:
- The development version is updated roughly every two to three weeks, with some changes potentially being significant or still having security issues.

- Multi-language support (Chinese) is not available yet.

- Supports [Self-Hosted](../9903c9783a97/)

- **Currently, the official version does not support exporting from Cloud to Self-Hosted. You can only achieve this by connecting through the API yourself. Therefore, if you are considering using Self-Hosted locally, it is recommended to treat the Cloud version as a trial only.**

- macOS App, iOS App, and Android App are also under active development.
translations.- The first time you enter Plane.so, you:
- The first time you enter Plane.so, you will need to create your initial Workspace.

- A Workspace is similar to an Asana workspace; one account can join multiple Workspaces.

- For small companies using cross-team collaboration, it can be within the same Workspace.

- For large companies with cross-team collaboration, Plane lacks Asana's Team feature and Project grouping. Having all Projects in the same Workspace can cause confusion. It is recommended to separate teams by using different Workspaces instead.
translations.- The homepage displays the current Cycl:
- The homepage displays the current Cycle and its progress, along with a burndown chart.

- Upcoming Cycles and Completed Cycles

- Currently, Cycles must be created manually.

- For example, create an SXX for every two-week Sprint and then assign the time period.

- Cycle time periods cannot overlap.

- Cycle time periods cannot be set to past dates.

- An Issue can only be added to one Cycle.
translations.- To Do: Tasks to start this week and ne:
- To Do: Tasks to start this week and next week

- In Progress: Items in progress

- Review: Done, waiting for Sprint Review

- Backlog: A pool of tasks from which weekly tasks are selected for execution.
translations.- You can click the AI button next to \": - You can click the AI button next to "Create" to enter a prompt and automatically generate default Issue content. Click "Use this response" to apply it to the Issue Description.
translations.- You can create Views for frequently us:
- You can create Views for frequently used filters and display modes, allowing quick access directly from here.

- You can use different display modes and filters to view Issues at the top of the View.
translations.1. Image preview, draggable or right-cli:
1. Image preview, draggable or right-click to open in a new window for enlargement (click to enlarge is currently unavailable)

2. You can click to add a Sub-Issue (Sub-Issues currently do not support sorting or Section features)

3. Add Emojis (Currently only seven emojis available: 👍👎😀💥😕✈️👀)

4. Upload attachments (not limited to images, but images currently have no preview and require clicking to view)

5. Comment Discussion Area (Currently, Chinese input will be submitted automatically. Please refer to the solution at the end.)

6. Subscribe/Unsubscribe to notifications for this Issue change

7. Relates to Issues that can be linked

8. Blocking can mark Issues that are blocked by this Issue (currently no special functionality)

9. Blocked by can tag the Issue that is blocking this Issue (currently no special functionality)

10. Duplicate of Mark duplicate Issues (currently no special function)

11. Labels allow quick tagging and creation of tags

12. Links related, can add external links like Figma, Google Doc, etc.

13. Deleting and Archiving Issues
translations.1.首先先安裝 JavaScript 瀏覽器注入外掛：\n\n: 1. First, install the JavaScript browser injection extension:
translations.2.回到 Plane.so 上點擊擴充套件 -&gt; 點擊「+」\n\n: 2. Go back to Plane.so, click Extensions -> click "+"
translations.3.將以下 JavaScript 注入到 Plane.so\n\n: 3. Inject the following JavaScript into Plane.so
translations.> **Note:** ⚠️ **Open source does not me: > **Note:** ⚠️ **Open source does not mean free** ⚠️. Like Github and Gitlab, there are many project management tools similar to Github, such as Asana, Jira, and Clickup. However, there is no open-source product as good as Gitlab yet. Plane's goal is to become the Gitlab of project management tools.
translations.> However, since the official documentat: > However, since the official documentation is not yet complete, many request methods are not listed. The fastest way is to open the browser tools, check the Network requests, see how the official API requests are made, and use your own key to access them.
translations.> Since Plane.so is still in development: > 由於 Plane.so 仍在開發中且產品非常新，其安全性尚不確定。建議不要上傳任何敏感資料，以避免服務出現重大問題時導致資料外洩。或者，使用[自架版](../9903c9783a97/)僅限於本地內網使用。
translations.> That said, let's begin the main conten: > That said, let's begin the main content.
translations.> The Asana Taiwan distributor also offe: > The Asana Taiwan distributor also offers comprehensive training. Feel free to contact them if interested.
> The above is just a workflow example. Please note that there is no perfect process, only the one that fits your team. Use the framework provided by Plane.so to creatively find the best project management method.
translations.> The above is the introduction for the: > The above is the introduction for the 2024–05–25 v0.20-Dev version. The official team is actively developing new features and improving user experience. The mentioned limitations may be resolved in future updates, so please refer to the latest version for the best experience.
translations.> There are many ways to use Asana. Belo: > There are many ways to use Asana. Below are a few use cases. It is recommended to first identify your needs before applying relevant Asana examples.
translations.Active Cycles 所有 Projects 當前 Cycle 狀態\n: Active Cycles All Projects Current Cycle Status
translations.Add to favorites， Pin 到 我的最愛 (Your Proje: Add to favorites, Pin to Favorites (above Your Projects)
translations.All Issues 所有 Projects 的 Issues\n: All Issues Issues from all Projects
translations.Anaytics 所有成員, Issues 分析\n: Analytics for All Members, Issues Analysis
translations.Asana 台灣代理商亦有提供完整的教育訓練，有興趣可以與他們聯絡。\n\n: The Asana Taiwan distributor also offers comprehensive training. Feel free to contact them if interested.
translations.Asana 的使用方式有很多，以下僅舉幾個使用案例，建議先確定需求再找相關 As: There are many ways to use Asana. Below are a few use cases. It is recommended to first identify your needs before applying relevant Asana examples.
translations.Automations：目前免費版僅支援超過 X 時間就自動把 Closed I: Automations: The free version currently only supports automatically archiving Closed Issues after X time and automatically closing incomplete Issues after X time.
translations.Backlog: 任務池子，每週從中挑出 Task 安排執行\n: Backlog: A pool of tasks from which weekly tasks are selected for execution.
translations.Backlog：有什麼工作、發想都開 Issue，State = Backlog: Backlog: Create an Issue for any task or idea, set State = Backlog, **fill in Estimate and Priority**
translations.Billing and plans 付費資訊、升級方案\n: Billing and plans Payment Information and Upgrade Options
translations.Blocked by 可標記正在阻擋此 Issue 執行的 Issue (目前無: Blocked by can tag the Issue that is blocking this Issue (currently no special functionality)
translations.Blocking 可標記正在被此 Issue 阻擋執行的 Issue (目前無特: Blocking can mark Issues that are blocked by this Issue (currently no special functionality)
translations.Community Edition (官方簡稱 CE 版)， Self-Host: Community Edition (officially called CE), the Self-Hosted version, also starts at $0. **Advanced features still require purchasing Pro, but Self-Hosting is supported**.
translations.Cycle 時間週期不能選擇過去時間\n: Cycle time periods cannot be set to past dates
translations.Cycle 時間週期無法重複\n: Cycle time periods cannot be repeated
translations.Cycles：類似 Sprint，一個迭代的時間週期或是版本，每個 Issue: Cycles: Similar to Sprints, a cycle is a time iteration or version. Each Issue can only belong to one Cycle.
translations.Cycle：依照 Sprint 週期建立 Cycle，假設是每週一個 Sprin: Cycle: Create a Cycle based on the Sprint cycle. For example, if there is one Sprint per week, you can create `W12` or use the Monday date like `2024–05–27`.
translations.Daily Stand-up：每日早上花 15 分鐘快速各自分享 Issue 執: Daily Stand-up: Spend 15 minutes every morning quickly sharing the status of each Issue
translations.Draft Issues 查看已儲存的草稿 Issues\n: Draft Issues View saved draft issues
translations.Drive：類似 Google Drive 團隊檔案功能。\n: Drive: Similar to Google Drive team file features.
translations.Duplicate of 標記重複的 Issue (目前無特殊功能)\n: Duplicate of Mark duplicate Issues (currently no special function)
translations.Estimates：專案估時欄位設定 (後面會介紹)\n: Estimates: Project time estimation field settings (to be introduced later)
translations.Exports 匯出功能，目前僅提供 csv, excel, json 格式匯出: Exports feature currently supports only csv, excel, and json formats.
translations.Features：可控制要啟用哪些功能(預設不啟用 Inbox 功能)\n: Features: Allows control over which features to enable (Inbox is disabled by default)
translations.Guest/Viewer 目前功能上無太大區別，僅能檢視 Issue、Comme: Guest/Viewer currently have no major functional differences; they can only view Issues, Comments, and Emojis. External users outside the organization’s email domain are classified as Guests, while those within the same organization are Viewers.
translations.Home 整個 Workspace 所有 Projects, 成員狀態\n: Home shows all Projects and member status in the entire Workspace
translations.Imports 匯入功能，目前僅提供 Jira, Github Project: Imports feature currently only supports Jira and Github Project imports
translations.Inbox：Issue Proposed 流程，可建立提案 Issue，審核通過: Inbox: Issue Proposed process allows creating proposal Issues. Only approved proposals will become actual Issues in the project; rejected ones are discarded.
translations.Integrations 第三方整合，目前免費版僅提供 Github, Slac: Integrations Third-party integrations, currently the free version only offers Github and Slack integrations
translations.Integrations：第三方整合 (Workspace 要先啟用)\n: Integrations: Third-Party Integrations (Workspace must be enabled first)
translations.Issue 創建好之後，在列表點擊會出現 Issue Preview 視窗，可以: After creating an Issue, clicking it in the list will open the Issue Preview window, where you can expand to enter the Issue Full-Screen page:
translations.Issue 只能加入一個 Cycle\n: An Issue can only be added to one Cycle
translations.Issue 可以的話加上 Start Date & Due Date、Modul: If possible, add Start Date & Due Date, Modules, and Priority to the Issue.
translations.Issue 完成更改狀態成 Done，或是多建立一個 Review State\: Change the Issue status to Done when completed, or add a Review State.
translations.Issue 準備執行、開始執行 更改狀態成 ToDo/In Progress\n: Change issue status to ToDo/In Progress when preparing to start or starting execution
translations.Issues：同 Asana Task，任何工作都開成 Issue 再安排處理或: Issues: Same as Asana Tasks, all work is created as Issues to be scheduled or kept as records.
translations.Labels 可快速標記、創建標記\n: Labels allow quick tagging and creation of tags
translations.Layouts & Views：可以使用 甘特圖、行事曆、看板、列表、Sheet: Layouts & Views: You can view Issues using Gantt charts, calendars, boards, lists, and Sheet modes. You can also save filter criteria and display settings as Views for quick access.
translations.Lead：Project 主要負責人\n: Lead: Main person in charge of the project
translations.Linkes 相關連結，可加入 Figam, Google Doc 之類的外部連: Links related, can add external links like Figma, Google Doc, etc.
translations.Modules：專案、模組、分類功能，每個 Issue 可加入多個 Module: Modules: Project, module, and categorization features. Each issue can be assigned to multiple modules.
translations.Modules：建立 Function Modules (設計, 前端, 後端,: Modules: Create Function Modules (Design, Frontend, Backend, App) to help Team Leads track progress and set OKRs or project goals as Modules (Increase Conversion Rate, OKR-1 Increase GMV…)
translations.Pages 提供所見即所得的文檔編輯器，可以很容易的撰寫文檔、插入圖片\n: Pages offers a WYSIWYG document editor, making it easy to write documents and insert images.
translations.Pages：簡易文檔功能，可以記錄一些工作、產品事項。\n: Pages: A simple document feature to record work and product-related notes.
translations.Plane 成立於 2022 年，是來自 美國德拉瓦州 和 印度 的新創公司，目: Plane was founded in 2022 and is a startup based in Delaware, USA, and India. Currently, most developers observed on [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/planepowers/){:target="_blank"} and [Github](https://github.com/makeplane/plane){:target="_blank"} are located in India. The company has raised $4 million in seed funding from OSS Capital.
translations.Plane 提供雲端版本服務，$0 美金起，Pro 提供更多框架與整合、自動化功: Plane offers a cloud service starting at $0 USD, with the Pro plan providing more frameworks, integrations, and automation features.
translations.Plane.so 不同於 Asana 的多維度彈性但 Plane 由以下框架組成: Plane.so is different from Asana's multi-dimensional flexibility but is composed of the following framework for project management:
translations.Plane.so 專案管理工具使用介紹與搭配 Scurm 流程的使用\n\n: Introduction to Using Plane.so Project Management Tool and Its Integration with Scrum Process
translations.Plane.so 是很乾淨的前後分離架構，因此有很完整的 API 可以使用，從: Plane.so has a clean frontend-backend separation architecture, providing a complete API. After creating API Tokens in Workspace Settings, you can use them by including the `X-API-Key` in the API Request Header. For API endpoint request methods, refer to the official [API documentation](https://docs.plane.so/api-reference/introduction){:target="_blank"}.
translations.Project 名稱、簡介、封面圖、前綴 (Issue Alias e.g. `: Project Name, Description, Cover Image, Prefix (Issue Alias e.g. `APP-1`)
translations.Project 權限：Public 所有加入 Workspace 的成員都能查看: Project Permissions: Public - All members who join the Workspace can view and join; Private - Only invited members can join
translations.Projects：其他可建立如行銷廣告 Project、客服支援 Project: Projects: Other projects can be created, such as marketing campaigns, customer support projects, or projects for external collaboration, separate from the main product development project.
translations.Publish 產生公開對外連結，如同官方 [Roadmap Project](: Publish generates a public external link, similar to the official [Roadmap Project](https://sites.plane.so/plane/459cfcdf-dc9c-49a6-9d4b-a89f91440189/?board=kanban){:target="_blank"}
translations.Relates to 可加入關聯的 Issues\n: Relates to Issues that can be linked
translations.Review: 已完成，等待 Sprint Review\n: Review: Done, waiting for Sprint Review
translations.Sprint 中如果有插單執行的 Issue 也需要直接開在本週 Cycle\n: If there is an urgent Issue added during the Sprint, it should be directly created in the current week's Cycle.
translations.States：專案 Issue 狀態 (後面會介紹)\n: States: Project Issue statuses (will be introduced later)
translations.To Do: 這週、下週將要開始的任務\n: To Do: Tasks to start this week and next week
translations.View 上方一樣可以使用不同顯示方式、Filter 查看 Issues\n: You can use different display modes and filters to view Issues at the top of the View.
translations.Webhooks API tokens，自行串接 API\n: Webhooks API tokens, self-integrate with API
translations.Workspace 同 Asana 工作區域，一隻帳號可以加入多個 Worksp: Workspace is similar to Asana workspace; one account can join multiple Workspaces.
translations.[**awesome-selfhosted**](https://awesome:
[**awesome-selfhosted**](https://awesome-selfhosted.net/){:target="_blank"}  
[*A list of Free Software network services and web applications that can be hosted on your own servers* awesome-selfhosted.net](https://awesome-selfhosted.net/){:target="_blank"}
translations.[另外官方正在推廣 $799 早期終身方案，有興趣付費支持的團隊可以直接參考此方: [Additionally, the official team is promoting a $799 early lifetime plan. Teams interested in paid support can refer directly to this plan](https://plane.so/one){:target="_blank"}.
translations.macOS App, iOS App, Android App 也正如火如荼開發: macOS App, iOS App, and Android App are also under active development.
translations.上傳附加檔案 (不限於是圖片，但是圖片目前無預覽功能，需點擊查看)\n: Upload attachments (not limited to images, but images currently have no preview and require clicking to view)
translations.不同於 Asana，Plane 的 Issue 只能加入一個 Project\n: Unlike Asana, an Issue in Plane can only be added to one Project.
translations.以上只是工作流程範例，請注意沒有完美的流程，只有適合您團隊的流程；請參考 Pla: The above is just a workflow example. Please note that there is no perfect process, only the one that fits your team. Use the framework provided by Plane.so to creatively find the best project management method.
translations.以上是 2024–05–25 v0.20-Dev 版的使用介紹，官方仍如火如荼開: The above is the introduction for the 2024–05–25 v0.20-Dev version. The official team is actively developing new features and improving user experience. The mentioned limitations may be resolved in future updates, so please refer to the latest version for the best experience.
translations.以上是 Chromium 共用的套件，其他瀏覽器也可以搜尋類似的 JavaScr: The above are common packages shared by Chromium. Other browsers can also search for similar JavaScript Inject injection tools.
translations.任何事物我們都需要與對方團隊進行直接溝通，P0 事務直接溝通是最有效的，但日常上: For everything, we need direct communication with the other team. Direct communication is most effective for P0 issues, but in daily work, 90% of the time the issues are not P0. Direct person-to-person communication for all matters, big or small, is very inefficient and can [interrupt the other person's workflow](../11f6c8568154/).
translations.任務執行不透明，只有對談雙方知道狀況進度，如果是多方任務就只能靠溝通反覆確認進度: Task execution lacks transparency, and only the parties involved know the progress. For tasks involving multiple people, progress can only be confirmed through repeated communication. Additionally, supervisors find it difficult to grasp everyone's tasks for proper scheduling.
translations.任務的交接，有工具紀錄任務細節、執行狀況，若遇到需要其他人協助時，可以快速從 T: Task handover is facilitated by tools that record task details and execution status. When assistance from others is needed, the task can be quickly taken over based on the content in the Task.
translations.任務的安排，日常上我們會收到很多 Task，優先度有高有低、方向也很多面，有工具: Task scheduling: In daily work, we receive many tasks with varying priorities and directions. Having a tool helps collect and categorize similar issues, so they can be addressed together later. It also makes it easier to identify important tasks in daily planning.
translations.但因官方文件尚未完善，很多請求方式並沒有列在文件中，最快的方式就是打開瀏覽器工具: However, since the official documentation is not yet complete, many request methods are not listed. The fastest way is to open the browser tools, check the Network requests, see how the official API requests are made, and use your own key to access them.
translations.例如每兩週一個 Sprint 就要建立 SXX 然後指定時間週期\n: For example, create an SXX for every two-week Sprint and then assign the time period.
translations.其他操作、使用細節可參考官方文件。\n\n: For other operations and usage details, please refer to the official documentation.
translations.可以把 Modules 當成專案彙整、OKR 目標、職能分類(Design, F: Modules can be used as project collections, OKR goals, or functional categories (Design, FE, BE, App, etc.).
translations.可以點擊建立旁邊的 AI 按鈕輸入 Prompt 自動產出預設 Issue 內容: You can click the AI button next to "Create" to enter a prompt and automatically generate default Issue content. Click "Use this response" to apply it to the Issue Description.
translations.可依照 Assignees, Labels, States 查看 Issues\: Issues can be viewed by Assignees, Labels, and States
translations.可依照需求查看，Docker Self-Hosted 自架教學請參考下篇「 [*: You can check according to your needs. For the Docker Self-Hosted setup guide, please refer to the next article: [**Plane.so Docker Self-Hosted Setup Record**](../9903c9783a97/).
translations.可儲存成草稿 Issues\n: Can be saved as draft Issues
translations.可為 Module 加上 Link\n: You can add Links to Modules
translations.可為常用的篩選條件、檢視模式建立 View，可以直接從此快速查看。\n: You can create Views for frequently used filters and display modes, allowing quick access directly from here.
translations.可訂閱/取消訂閱此 Issue 改變通知\n: Subscribe/Unsubscribe to notifications for this Issue change
translations.可設定專案 Lead & Members\n: Project Lead & Members can be set
translations.可點擊新增 Sub-Issue (Sub-Issues 目前不支援排序、Sect: You can click to add a Sub-Issue (Sub-Issues currently do not support sorting or Section features)
translations.右上角可切換顯示方式\n: The display mode can be switched in the top right corner
translations.右方有燃盡圖、執行狀況\n: On the right side, there are burn-down charts and execution status.
translations.回到 Plane.so (重整) 打開一個 Issue 測試 Comment 功: Go back to Plane.so (refresh) and open an Issue to test the Comment feature.
translations.回到專案管理上，Asana 提供彈性、多維度、自動化的專案管理工具，可以依照需求: Back to project management, Asana offers flexible, multi-dimensional, and automated project management tools that can be combined as needed.
translations.因 Plane.so 還處於開發階段產品也很新，不確定是否有安全資安問題，建議不: Since Plane.so is still in development and a very new product, its security is uncertain. It is recommended not to upload any sensitive data to avoid data leaks if the service encounters major issues. Alternatively, use the [Self-Hosted](../9903c9783a97/) version for local intranet use only.
translations.因目前無法自動建立 Cycle，因此需每月或每週先建立好未來的 Cycle\n: Since automatic Cycle creation is not available, you need to create future Cycles monthly or weekly in advance.
translations.圖片預覽，可拖移或右鍵開新視窗放大 (目前無法點擊放大)\n: Image preview, draggable or right-click to open in a new window for enlargement (click to enlarge is currently unavailable)
translations.在前司 Pinkoi 時第一次體會到 Asana 專案管理工具的強大，不管是內部: At my previous company Pinkoi, I first experienced the power of the Asana project management tool. Whether for internal project management or cross-team collaboration, Asana plays a key role in decoupling dependencies between people and tasks, improving collaboration efficiency.
translations.在前司從產品團隊到經營、商業團隊 (如：HRBP, Finance, Marke: In my previous company, all teams—from product to operations and business teams (such as HRBP, Finance, Marketing, BD…)—had a public team Project that served as a single collaboration entry point across teams. When other teams needed assistance, they could directly create a Task (or use a Template Task) in that Project (usually there was a "Need Help!" Section). The receiving team would then take over the Task and arrange accordingly.
translations.基於以上環境限制，只能先朝開源且支援 Self-Hosted 的專案管理工具著手: Given the environmental constraints, we had to focus on open-source, self-hosted project management tools. The options we found were mainly Redmine, OpenProject, Taiga... After trying several, none met our expectations due to missing features and unfriendly UI/UX. That was until we accidentally discovered Plane.so, a project management tool newly launched in January 2023.
translations.如同前述，以上是前司 Pinkoi 有 Asana 專案管理工具的場景；這幾個月: As mentioned earlier, the above describes the scenario when Pinkoi used the Asana project management tool; returning to an environment without any project management tools these past few months has made me even more aware of how important such tools are for work efficiency.
translations.如果是大公司跨團隊，Plane 沒有如 Asana 的 Team 功能、Proj: For large companies with cross-team collaboration, Plane lacks Asana's Team feature and Project grouping. Having all Projects in the same Workspace can cause confusion. It is recommended to separate teams by using different Workspaces instead.
translations.如果是小型公司跨團隊使用可以在同個 Workspace\n: For small companies using cross-team collaboration, it can be within the same Workspace.
translations.專案進度與 Issue State 不同，多了 Planned, Paused: Project progress and Issue States differ, with additional statuses: Planned and Paused
translations.已不推薦使用 Plane.so，原因是 Plane.so 初期依靠開源專案與支援: Plane.so is no longer recommended because it initially gained popularity through its open-source project and self-hosting support. However, many features have since been moved into paid plans. Even self-hosted users need to purchase licenses to unlock functions, and there are user limits for self-hosting, which no longer meets the original expectations. Additionally, the pricing plans are very confusing, with lifetime, Pro, Business options, and it’s uncertain whether new plans will be introduced that restrict new features to those plans only, even for paying customers.
translations.從大頭貼 -> Settings -> Preferences -> Email: Go to Avatar -> Settings -> Preferences -> Email to enable Email notifications
translations.從大頭貼 -> Settings -> Preferences -> Theme: From the avatar -> Settings -> Preferences -> Theme, you can select the Plane theme
translations.我們可以快速、免費直接的開始使用 Plane Cloud 版本：\n\n: We can quickly and freely start using the Plane Cloud version directly:
translations.持續迭代以上流程，管理所有 Issues、Projects\n: Continuously iterate the above process to manage all Issues and Projects
translations.按 Enter 選字已不會自動送出了，按空白 + Shift Enter 可換行: Pressing Enter to select a word no longer submits automatically. Use Space + Shift + Enter to insert a line break, and manually click Comment to submit the comment.
translations.支援多位 Assignees (這點比 Asana 方便，Asana 只支援一個: Supports multiple Assignees (more convenient than Asana, which only allows one Assignee per Task)
translations.支援文字樣式、Code Block\n: Supports text styling and Code Block
translations.支援文繞圖，可直接拖曳圖片上傳\n: Supports text wrapping around images, allows direct drag-and-drop image upload
translations.文檔權限：Public 所有 Project 成員可見、Private 僅自己可: Document Permissions: Public - visible to all Project members; Private - visible only to yourself.
translations.新增表情符號 (目前只有 👍👎😀💥😕✈️👀 七種表情符號)\n: Add Emojis (Currently only seven emojis available: 👍👎😀💥😕✈️👀)
translations.暫時不支援多語系(中文)\n: Multi-language support (Chinese) is not available yet.
translations.有什麼工作都要開 Issue\n: Create an Issue for Every Task
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.每個團隊會有一個主要的產品 Project\n: Each team will have a main product Project.
translations.每個團隊有自己的 Workspace\n: Each team has its own Workspace
translations.每週五盡量確保 Cycle 內所有 Issue 都是完成的， **未完成的 Is: Try to ensure all Issues in the Cycle are completed by Friday each week. **Unfinished Issues should be added to the next week's Cycle or moved to Pending/Cancel**.
translations.留言討論區域 (目前中文選自會自動送出，請參考文末解決方案)\n: Comment Discussion Area (Currently, Chinese input will be submitted automatically. Please refer to the solution at the end.)
translations.目前 Plane 佔據 Github [專案管理類別第一名](https://g: Currently, Plane ranks first in the Github [project management category](https://github.com/topics/project-management){:target="_blank"}, is open source under the [AGPL-3.0 license](https://github.com/makeplane/plane#AGPL-3.0-1-ov-file){:target="_blank"}, and was first released in January 2023. It is still under active development and has not yet provided an official Release version.
translations.目前不支援自訂 Issue Property\n: Custom Issue Properties are not supported yet
translations.目前免費版、CE (Self-Hosted)版 均無此功能。\n\n: Currently, this feature is not available in both the free version and the CE (Self-Hosted) version.
translations.目前暫不支援目錄、分類功能，文檔一多會很混亂\n: Currently, directory and category features are not supported, which can cause confusion when there are many documents.
translations.目前無 Slack 、第三方通知\n: Currently no Slack or third-party notifications
translations.目前環境沒有較現代的專案管理工具，基於採購(需控制支出)、內控問題(純內網)與個: Currently, there is no modern project management tool available. Due to procurement constraints (need to control expenses), internal control issues (purely intranet), and personal data audit restrictions (must be on-premises), Asana cannot be directly implemented.
translations.目前需要手動建立 Cycle\n: Currently, Cycles need to be created manually.
translations.範例二是使用 Section 作為 Sprint 區分，每週會建立一個 Sect: Example 2 uses Sections to separate Sprints. A new Section is created every week to drag tasks into, while Labels are used to mark other statuses.
translations.約保持兩到三週更新一次開發版本，部分調整可能差距較大或仍有資安問題。\n: The development version is updated roughly every two to three weeks, with some changes potentially being significant or still having security issues.
translations.與經營團隊的跨團隊協作，如採購、招募流程，可以直接開 Task 並透過他追蹤進度: Cross-team collaboration with the management team, such as procurement and recruitment processes, can be done by directly creating Tasks and tracking progress through them; collaboration with the business team includes marketing campaign planning and tasks requiring engineering assistance for modifications, etc.
translations.訂閱的 Issues 之狀態、內容更改、新留言都會有通知\n: Subscribed Issues will notify you of status changes, content updates, and new comments.
translations.說這麼多，以下正文開始。\n\n: That said, let's begin the main content.
translations.貼上程式碼後，按「Save」儲存。\n: After pasting the code, click "Save" to save.
translations.這邊提供一個自己寫的 Workaround JavaScript 腳本，去 Ho: Here is a custom Workaround JavaScript script to hook the Enter event.
translations.進入 Projects 查看所有公開、已加入的 Projects:\n\n: Go to Projects to view all public and joined Projects:
translations.進入後可由左方 Projects 建立 Project\n: After entering, you can create a Project from the Projects section on the left.
translations.選擇 Add parent，將此 Issue 作為 Sub-Issue 加入到: Select Add parent to add this Issue as a Sub-Issue under the Parent Issue.
translations.選擇 Cycle，要在哪個 Sprint 做，只能選一個，例如： `W22` ,: Select a Cycle to choose which Sprint to work on; only one can be selected, for example: `W22`, `S22`, `2024–05` … (settings will be introduced later)
translations.選擇 Estimate (a.k.a Scrum story point 或預計: Select Estimate (a.k.a Scrum story point or estimated resources). Estimates can be adjusted or added in Settings; however, currently only one Estimate field can be enabled, and the Estimate Value can only have 6 options. (The official roadmap states this feature will be improved in 2024 Q2)
translations.選擇 Issue State，State 可在 Settings 中調整、新增：: Select Issue State. States can be adjusted or added in Settings:
translations.選擇 Modules，可以加入多個 Modules，例如： `登入優化` , `: Select Modules to add multiple modules, for example: `Login Optimization`, `App`, etc. (Settings will be introduced later)
translations.選擇 Priority，不同 Priority 有不同高亮樣式 (目前無法客製化: Choose Priority. Different priorities have different highlight styles (currently, Priority customization is not available).
translations.選擇 Start Date, Due Date… (目前不支援到準確時間、不支援: Select Start Date, Due Date… (Currently does not support exact time or Repeated Issue)
translations.開了 Issue 給官方＆追了一下 Source Code，感覺修復機會蠻低的，: I opened an issue for the official team and checked the source code. It seems unlikely to be fixed because they never considered the need to select a language and directly tied the keyboard Enter event to submit the comment.
translations.除了團隊主 Project 外會再開一個 Scrum Project 安排(As: In addition to the main team Project, a separate Scrum Project is created for planning (Asana Tasks can be added to multiple Projects simultaneously) and reviewing the tasks completed in each Sprint.
translations.預設會展開所有 Sub-Issues，如果覺得很雜可以到 Display ->: By default, all Sub-Issues are expanded. If it feels cluttered, go to Display -> uncheck Show sub-Issues.
translations.預設自己建立的、被 Assign 的、Lead 的專案的 Issues 都會訂閱: By default, Issues that you create, are assigned to, or lead in a project will be subscribed.
translations.首次進入 Plane.so 會需要我們建立首個 Workspace\n: The first time you enter Plane.so, you will need to create your initial Workspace.
translations.首頁會顯示當前 Cycle 與其執行狀況、燃盡圖\n: The homepage displays the current Cycle and its progress, along with a burndown chart.
translations.點擊展開進入 Issue Full Screen Deatil 頁：\n\n: Click to expand and enter the Issue Full Screen Detail page:
translations.點擊進入可查看 Cycle 細節，上方可以使用不同顯示方式、Filter 查看: Click to view Cycle details. At the top, you can use different display modes and filters to view Issues.
translations.點擊進入可查看 Module 細節，上方可以使用不同顯示方式、Filter 查看: Click to view Module details. You can use different display modes and filters above to view Issues.
